name: Consent-First Structural Charter
charter_statement: Cross-boundary interactions shall default to explicit, legible, and revisable consent wherever capacity permits.

constitutional: Consentful authorization over coerced or implicit crossing.
comparator_tiering.note: Operational comparators may not override constitutional consent without governance-level justification.

governance_implications: Where power asymmetry is high, governance must scaffold consent.
Where reversibility is low, consent thresholds must rise.
Comparator revision cadence must preserve consent priority.
structural_predictions: Lower cascade risk from resistance dynamics.
failure_modes: Ledger omission of affected parties (C5 shadow).
